I wonder what happened to his leg Was he in the military was he in the car accident right so I'll cover that first I was born in Tampa, Florida May 14th 1961. I had a I was born in a segregated hospital almost a hundred years after the Civil War and The conditions that a hospital were so poor that I contracted polio as an infant my parents moved from Florida all the way to Pennsylvania before I got diagnosed and treated and What's really interesting about that is the fact that? Polio is a neuromuscular disease that attacks the nerves in your spine that controls certain parts of your body So my left leg did not develop as fast as the rest of me and so by the time I was 13 how old? 13 by time I was 13 my left leg was two inches shorter two inches shorter than my right leg two inches and The doctors came to me and my parents they said hey mr. Mrs. Gold we got this great thing we can do for your son We can stretch his leg two inches I'm 13 I've seen Gumby. I've seen the Fantastic Four and One thing I know at 13 is that bones ain't made out of rubber Right and so they said what we're gonna do is we're gonna break his leg the tibia. We're gonna break it in the middle Right here the fibula we're gonna break at the top and at the top and at the bottom Right, so I got the two bones in my shin right so they broke the fibula at the top in the bottom They said we're gonna we're gonna put two screws We're gonna put two screws through the tibia And we're gonna put it on this metal rack with these knobs on it. We're gonna turn these knobs Daily turn it how how often talk to me everybody how often we're gonna turn these knobs daily and we're gonna do this for 30 days and At the end of 30 days his leg will be stretched two inches. I said wow They said now he won't be able to go to school for a whole month I said sign me up right now. How many y'all know what I'm talking about so so so they started this process They started this process and they were turning these knobs, but I'm 13 so when you're 13 you're growing pretty fast Right so they're turning these knobs every day like a half a turn a day, but something really really Devastating to me happened two weeks into this process and the thing that happened was The bone was growing back together too fast So the doctor comes in after two weeks as we're not gonna make two inches because the bones growing together too fast I'm like destroyed right. I'm like what? Like I called my dad. I called my mom. I'm crying. I'm there come down there. What's wrong Between the daddy kid like and the doctor said well, we could turn it a whole turn, but that might hurt Right, I mean I'm already in the hospital it might hurt Okay, let's turn it a whole turn two turns three turns five turns you told me two inches Let's get the deal done. Oh, yeah. Yeah. Yeah. How many y'all have ever seen somebody having an anxiety attack what are the signs of an anxiety attack? Right they start hyperventilating right what else heart starts pop beating really fast Right hands are sweating forehead sweating and when you're having an anxiety attack. What can you do? Nothing sit down or lie down. That's all you can do. How many I know what I'm talking about Why is why is it the only thing I can do when I'm having an anxiety attack? Why is the only thing I can do is to sit down or lie down? Because anxiety I'm gonna give you the definition of anxiety y'all ready everybody say I'm ready Okay, here we go the definition of anxiety Anxiety is wasting present energy on a future outcome that is undesirable to me Wasting present energy On a future outcome that's undesirable to me. It would be like me sitting in my car My car has a v12 engine right? Can you imagine me getting my car started my car? Right and just sitting in the driveway and just hammer it down with it in part Right it'd be really loud how far would I go nowhere and what would happen eventually within a couple of minutes What would happen? I blow the engine be no more good not have this Pieces young sitting in the car in the driveway with a blown engine right? Instead of this really fine luxury automobile that can take me anywhere really really fast right? But what's the difference? I just sat there. I didn't put it in gear. I didn't put the car in gear. I just sat there revved up the engine about nothing That's exactly what happens when you have an anxiety attack You are wasting present energy on a future outcome that's undesirable to you And that's why people have heart attacks when they have anxiety attacks And that's why people have strokes because they're revving up their internal engine while their cars and park You're wasting energy Don't do that. Don't allow yourself. Are y'all picking up what I'm putting down Okay, so the law of attraction Really what happens is I think about the future outcome that I desire and I envision how I'm gonna feel when it happens and I Think happy thoughts about that future outcome and Thinking about achieving that future outcome Gives me energy in the present to take the action that is necessary to produce that result There are a lot of people Who say well You can speak things into exist. What is the magic word? Everybody say it. What is it? How comes everybody knows that word right the word is abracadabra? That's that's how we say it in English But how do like if a Chinese magician or a Spanish magician or a Russian magician weighs the magic wand? What do they say? They say abracadabra Abracadabra is the same word in every language in the world Except abracadabra is not a word Abracadabra is a sentence Yes, abracadabra is a sentence and the sentence is it's a Hebrew sentence it is It's it's spelled like it's spelled like this And I yeah and then Okay, I forgot how to write that letter. I'll just do it like that Yeah, just make it up. Just make it up. Hey if you get lost just make it up, right? And then Right, so there we go, that's abracadabra this is so This is an olive it represents a God borah Borah means to create That's what borah means now in the Bible the only person who ever borahs is God I'm going somewhere with this for you just hang in there. So abracadabra Says God creates ha is as and then Dabar is Speaks and then ah is God the word abracadabra Is God creates as God speaks that's what the word actually means in Hebrew. That's pretty cool, right? So people say you can speak things into existence the reason I think say you can't speak things into existence is because There's no place in the Bible that says you can speak things into existence But the Bible does tell us there is one thing we can speak into existence. Would y'all like to know what that is? If y'all'd like to know it is say yes, okay, there's one thing we can speak into existence the one thing that we can speak into existence is called F a I Th we can speak faith into existence. Why is this important? Well, it's important because if I doubt that something is going to work Will I take the action to make it work? Yes or no? No if I doubt it's gonna work. I'm not gonna do it I'm why waste my time? That's why when people have anxiety They just sit down or lie down because they believe taking action won't do them any good So they might as well just go ahead and sit down and rev up the engine right But the the scripture tells us that faith Comes by hearing and hearing by the word of God see doubt is created in the eyes when we look at how something appears It'll almost always fake us out So we've got to learn to say something different to ourselves Here's why because when I say when I tell myself that I can achieve the outcome that I desire What happens is I speak faith Into a place where doubt used to exist where doubt used to exist and that faith that doubt was gonna create anxiety But now the faith is gonna create anticipation and that anticipation is going to create a function called action So here's what really happens I tell myself by the way really like literally if you're working on something and you're You're be it you are tempted to worry about it not working write out Exactly what it would look like and how you would feel if it worked or when it works and then read that out loud to yourself I'm not like you might come on my I could okay. I'm gonna tell you a story about how I did this meant over and over and over and over again So but before I do that I'm gonna show you something So we see that the reality of this whole law of attraction thing is the law of attraction is really the law of of at action The law of attraction is really the law of at action What does that mean that means where I was my beliefs were inhibiting my action before I Allowed myself to see a future outcome that's desired that's desirable and so I told myself So I could hear myself what it was gonna look like what it's gonna feel like how much fun It was gonna be and then all of a sudden where I was paralyzed by my anxiety before now I'm energized by my anticipation. Let me let me give you a picture of it of being energized by anticipation they are member when you were a little little kid and It was Christmas Eve and you knew what you were getting the next day your parents sent you to bed and they said go to sleep Yeah, right Right. How many y'all know what I'm talking about the one thing that you cannot do right now asleep Why because your expectation of the outcome of playing with those toys tomorrow gave you so much energy It didn't matter that you wanted to go to sleep so the next day could come you couldn't go to sleep Why because anticipation gives you energy and always has it always does whether you know it or not. That's how it works So what if you could intentionally create anticipation in your life? Everything would change. I Remember when I used to publish a newspaper now you got to understand I Couldn't pass a ninth grade English test to save my grandma's life Do you understand what I'm saying? Like comma semicolon I used a comma last time I use a semicolon this time. I'll use a colon. I didn't know I'm telling you but I Published this newspaper as a third-party marketing validation piece and so And the reason I decided to start publishing a newspaper because I used to buy these newspapers I used to sell health health supplements And so what I would do is I would there's this company that sold health news Some of y'all have probably seen these newspapers they talk about peranthocyanin and sometimes they talk about all these different supplements, right? They create these and they sell to the shirts. I said one wait a minute. I'm buying these from these people They can have a newspaper. I can have a newspaper by the way There's nothing that makes sense about any of the store like I should not have had that thought that's weird Okay, but I did it anyway because I'm a little on the odd side. So I said, okay, I'm gonna start a newspaper So what's the first thing I do? I start calling printing companies. Hey, do you guys print newspapers? You guys print newspapers you got nope nope nope nope nope nope nope One company finally says no you need a printing company that has a web press. I'm gonna start a newspaper I don't even know what a web press is Don't have any idea. So I said I'm gonna start a newspaper. Okay, cool. So then I Finally find a company that has I said is there a company and I lived in Jacksonville, Florida at the time is there a company in Jacksonville Has a web press. Yeah, there's one out on the US one. Okay, cool. I called it said can you guys print newspaper for me? They said we can I said great This I'm not exaggerating this is how it worked like I had already made up my mind I'm doing this right so I call them I say oh by the way, what software should I use to create a newspaper? I want to get these newspapers printed. I want you guys to print them great. We'll print them Okay, what software should I use they said you should use quark express or you should use Adobe page maker? okay, cool and so I Had Adobe page maker I opened it up and the first thing I learned about Adobe page maker that it does not work Anything like Microsoft Word I Couldn't even put a picture on the on the paper Right, so I called them up. I said hey guys I have Adobe page maker, but I don't know how to use it if I come out to your printing company Do you have somebody there who can show me how to use the software? They said sure I went out to the office the next day somebody took an hour. They showed me how to use the software I went back. I started using I said, okay, great. Y'all ever heard of Mark Victor Hanson and Robert Allen I marked their co-author of chicken soup for the soul one-minute millionaire I called their office. They had just come out with the one-minute millionaire. I called their office I said my name is Myron Golden I'm the I'm the editor-in-chief of the financial freedom news And I'd like to interview mark and bob for our newspaper and if they will do the interview with me I will give them a free ad in my newspaper in every ad week in every paper we print They sent me a press kit sign pictures sign books all kinds of this is so cool. I'm the editor-in-chief. This is great And so I Long story short I interviewed him create this newspaper And then I started selling it because I was doing network market I started selling it to the people my team and I started selling it to my company then I started creating it for other companies I've sold I sold hundreds of thousands of these newspapers now Here's what's amazing if somebody bought one paper. I would sell it to them for 50 cents If somebody bought a hundred papers, I would sell them to them for 35 cents If somebody so that be costing thirty five dollars for a hundred papers if somebody bought 250 papers I'd sell it. Y'all remember that? So I chose not to participate in it Because I know that you create your own economy and so I said I'm just creating my own economy But some of the clients that owed me money they didn't they didn't have the same perspective so I had clients that owed me over a quarter of a million dollars that got abducted by aliens and Some of them were kidnapped and some of them are still prisoners of war that this day. I've never heard from them again. Okay But what I did and I'm gonna do this long story short I Heard about the CEO of a company's company was doing 40 something million dollars a month in revenue On a whim I got on a plane. I flew to Jacksonville drove to I lived in Pennsylvania at the time drove to Tallahassee Walked up to this guy's office when I got there a friend of mine was there Talked to this guy for a couple of hours We just kind of talked and got to know each other because he they did events like this and I wanted to get on his event stage, right? Right before Right before we got ready to go like 15 minutes before we get ready to go. I told him I said I said, you know I could do something really cool for you guys I Could create a special edition of my book And a special edition of my newspaper Just for you guys and if you buy enough of them, I'll give you a great discount So I told him I said if you'll buy a hundred thousand books I'll sell them to you for three books and we had already sold like 40,000 books at that time if you buy a hundred thousand of them I'll sell them to you for three dollars and fifty cents apiece If you sell if you buy two hundred thousand of the newspapers, I'll sell them to you for fifty cents apiece and So No, no four hundred thousand news. Let me see no two hundred thousand newspaper. I'll sell them to you for fifty cents Me so two hundred thousand newspapers. We did the deal So after I said that he said you do that for us. I said, oh, yeah I said just put two hundred thousand down so it came to out the four hundred thousand dollars Four hundred thousand dollar sale Four hundred thousand dollar sale I said give me half an hour half upon delivery He picked up his phone called his accounting department said bring me a check for two hundred thousand dollars Then he looked at me. He said do you want me make it out to in your name or your company now I said make it out of my company name made out my company name. I called my assistant. She faxed down a Purchase order and we did the deal and I did a four hundred thousand dollar sale because I did not allow my Expectation to talk me out of it Does that make sense everyone? He last year he bought a rocket company I this stuff that I'm telling you works So I wrote a book called and Alex said I can give you guys a copy of my book But and I'm gonna tell you this really quick amount of time But I wrote a book called from the trash man to the cash man how anyone can get rich starting from anywhere I was talking to one of my students on the phone last night.
